channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping of large items on pavement, 17th March
item.description:
Yet again there is rubbish dumped on the pavement near the stairs to the flats over the shops in Blackfen Rd.. This constant dumping of rubbish is becoming a real issue. It is costing the council and us as council tax payers money. My suggestion is that you install cameras to catch the perpetrators and make some money out of fining them. You would soon cover the cost of the camera installation.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Maple Crescent, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposting on utilities cabinet, 17th March
item.description:
Flyposting on utilities cabinet
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46-52, Peckham High Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Some streetlights are out by the footbridge, 17th March
item.description:
Some streetlights are out by the footbridge. One in the middle and one on the side next to bus stop WX. Also the light for the footbridge blue sign, near the WX bus stop is also out. Noticed this yesterday, unsure how long they have been out.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ostliffe Road, Bowes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 17th March
item.description:
See picture Bristow road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Bristow Road, West Norwood, Greater London

item.title: Multiple potholes, 17th March
item.description:
Multiple potholes on the road. The roads in very bad condition and needing repairs. Risk of car damages and accidents occurring
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sundridge Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish on Maple Road, 17th March
item.description:
There is a lot of rubbish across the road and pavements down maple road - some of it looks to have been dumped and there for quite sometime.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Padua Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish fly tipped in woods in park, 17th March
item.description:
There are a bunch of pieces of wood, parts of chairs and other rubbish fly tipped in the woods in Shaftsbury Park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexandra Crescent, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: No lights, 17th March

item.title: Lime bike, 17th March
item.description:
Lime bike laying in the middle of the pavement top end of the street, needs removing ASAP
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whitworth Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street litter, 17th March
item.description:
There is lots of litter along maple road, which has been there for months. There is often food scraps which attracts birds, rats and foxes, as well as broken rubbish bags
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 140, Maple Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
